creator: strigeus@home.se
text:
Hello again!

I think I have solved the problem, at least for my computer (It seems).

In my BIOS I had a setting that determined if the USB should get an IRQ or
not. When I enabled that setting, the installation started.

Reference:
http://groups.google.com/groups?q=intr_connect(irq0)&rnum=2&selm=XFMail.0108
23220420.msch%40snafu.de

Regards,
Ludvig Strigeus
